steps.title: Find z
steps.content: First, 40% less than 45 means subtract 40% of 45 from 45. In decimal form, 40% = 0.40, so $$z = 45 \times (1 - 0.40) = 45 \times 0.60 = 27$$.

steps.title: Find w
steps.content: The number w is 120% greater than z, meaning $w = z + 120\% \text{ of } z = z \times (1 + 1.20)$. Substitute z = 27: $$w = 27 \times (1 + 1.20) = 27 \times 2.20 = 59.4 = \frac{297}{5}$$ The answer is 297/5.
